#Notion #Productivity

Notion + personal finance = total money clarity 💰
No skills. No design. No excuses.
10 templates that do all the work 👇

---

1/ ROI Calculation Engine
You bought [TICKER] months ago and still have no idea if you are actually up or down after fees.

Include:
- Total return per position
- Unrealized gain or loss
- Cost basis tracking
- Return percentage
- Auto-updated figures

---

2/ 8-Database Wealth System
Your stocks, bills, goals, and budget all live in separate places and never talk to each other.

Give me:
- Portfolio database
- Income and expense logs
- Accounts overview
- Budget and goals linked
- One unified workspace

---

3/ Financial Command Center Dashboard
You open four apps every morning just to get a rough sense of where your money stands.

Build me:
- Portfolio overview panel
- Recent transaction feed
- Net worth snapshot
- Goal progress summary
- Single-glance layout

---

4/ Monthly Spending Blueprint
You hit [MONTH] and have no idea where [AMOUNT] disappeared to this time.

Include:
- Category-level spend targets
- Actual vs budgeted view
- Instant overspend alerts
- Monthly reset structure
- Running balance tracker

---

5/ Financial Goals Tracker
You set a goal to save [AMOUNT] by [DATE] and have not checked your progress since week one.

Give me:
- Progress percentage formula
- Months remaining counter
- Milestone markers
- Priority ranking field
- Auto-updating status

---

6/ Net Worth Snapshot Machine
You have assets in three places and liabilities in two more and no single number to show for it.

Build me:
- Asset category totals
- Liability breakdown
- Net worth formula
- Monthly change tracker
- Historical trend view

---

7/ Investment Portfolio Blueprint
You have positions across [BROKER A] and [BROKER B] and no unified view of your actual allocation.

Include:
- All positions in one table
- Allocation percentage per asset
- Sector or class grouping
- Weight vs target column
- Rebalance flag field

---

8/ Income Stream Tracker
You freelance, invest, and work full-time but never know your true monthly take-home across all sources.

Give me:
- Income source categories
- Monthly total rollup
- Recurring vs one-time flag
- Year-to-date running total
- Source comparison view

---

9/ Expense Audit Engine
You want to cut spending but have no idea which [CATEGORY] is silently draining your account each month.

Build me:
- Expense log with categories
- Monthly subtotals per category
- Largest spend identifier
- Fixed vs variable split
- Linked budget comparison

---

10/ Distribution & Dividend System
You receive payouts from [INVESTMENT] but track them in a notes app and forget half by tax season.

Include:
- Distribution log per holding
- Payment date tracking
- Total received per period
- Reinvested vs withdrawn flag
- Annual income summary

---

That's 10 Notion prompts for personal finance. 💸
Built the template so you don't have to.
Get it for $13 → https://takasoccerfan.gumroad.com/l/glnhwp

Notion + project management = total team clarity 💰
No chaos. No dropped balls. No excuses.
10 templates that run your projects for you 👇

---

1/ The 360° Project Hub
You are juggling [PROJECT NAME] across Slack, email, and three spreadsheets and nothing lines up.

Give me:
- A single workspace linking every project to its tasks
- Milestones tied directly to the work beneath them
- Team members assigned across every relevant record
- Meeting notes connected back to their parent project
- A real-time view of every moving part in one place

---

2/ The Budget Rollup Engine
You approved [AMOUNT] for [PROJECT NAME] but you have no idea how much is actually left.

Give me:
- Auto-calculated cost totals pulled from individual tasks
- A live budget-remaining figure at the project level
- No manual spreadsheet entry ever again
- A clear breakdown of where every dollar is going
- An instant alert when costs are creeping past plan

---

3/ The Task Dependency Blueprint
[TASK NAME] is blocked and three other tasks are waiting on it but no one flagged it until today.

Give me:
- Blocked By and Blocking relations on every task
- A personal Kanban board filtered to my assignments only
- Sprint labels to group work into delivery windows
- A Days Overdue formula that surfaces late tasks instantly
- A clear chain of what must happen before what

---

4/ The Risk Priority Tracker
[RISK NAME] looked minor two weeks ago and now it is the reason [PROJECT NAME] might slip.

Give me:
- A risk register listing every known threat in one place
- A Risk Score that multiplies severity by probability automatically
- The most dangerous risks sorted to the top without manual ranking
- Linked issues that connect problems back to their source project
- A running log so nothing quietly disappears from view

---

5/ The Meeting Action System
You had a great call about [PROJECT NAME] and three days later no one has done anything.

Give me:
- A centralized meeting notes database for every session
- Direct links from each meeting back to its parent project
- Instant task creation from decisions made on the call
- Owners and due dates assigned before the call ends
- A trackable record so follow-through is never optional

---

6/ The Sprint Planning Machine
You start every week without knowing which tasks on [PROJECT NAME] actually need to move this sprint.

Give me:
- Sprint labels applied to every task so grouping is instant
- A filtered view showing only this sprint's work
- Assignments visible by team member across all active projects
- Milestone targets tied to the sprint you are planning
- A Kanban layout that updates as work moves forward

---

7/ The Milestone Progress Blueprint
You told [STAKEHOLDER] that [PROJECT NAME] is on track but you are not actually sure it is.

Give me:
- Milestones linked directly to the tasks beneath them
- A progress view that reflects real task completion
- Due dates on every milestone so slippage is obvious early
- A rollup showing which milestones are at risk right now
- A single source of truth to share with anyone asking

---

8/ The Team Workload Tracker
You have no idea if [TEAM MEMBER] is underwater or if they can take on more work this week.

Give me:
- Every team member linked to their active tasks
- A view filtered by person showing current assignments
- Sprint labels that reveal load by delivery window
- Overdue task flags surfaced at the individual level
- A clear picture of capacity before you assign anything new

---

9/ The Issue Escalation Engine
A small problem on [PROJECT NAME] sat untracked for two weeks and just became a serious delay.

Give me:
- An issue register separate from but linked to the risk log
- Severity and probability fields that score every issue automatically
- The highest-impact issues pushed to the top of the list
- Direct connections back to the project and tasks affected
- A log that proves every issue was seen and acted on

---

10/ The Project Kickoff Machine
Every time you start [PROJECT NAME] you waste the first week just figuring out where to set things up.

Give me:
- A ready-to-use project record with all six databases connected
- Pre-built task views filtered by sprint, owner, and status
- A risk register open and waiting before work even begins
- A meeting notes page linked and ready for the first call
- A complete project workspace live in under ten minutes

---

That's 10 Notion templates for project management. 💸
Built the system so you don't have to.
Get it for $13 → https://takasoccerfan.gumroad.com/l/glnhwp
